title: VerifyPermitResponse
description: Wire response returned by POST /v1-verify-permit. Emitted by atlasent-api/supabase/functions/v1-verify-permit/handler.ts. valid=false is NOT an HTTP error; it is a 200 response with outcome='deny' and a stable verify_error_code.

valid.description: true iff the permit is still valid, un-expired, un-revoked, and un-consumed.

outcome.description: Server-side verification outcome. 'allow' iff valid=true. SDKs typically translate this to a richer four-value (verified | expired | invalid | error) using verify_error_code.

verify_error_code.description: Stable code populated when outcome='deny'. SDKs map these onto a higher-level verified|expired|invalid|error envelope; unknown codes MUST fail-closed to invalid.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation. Safe to surface to operators; not a stable identifier.

decision.description: Echo of the decision the permit's evaluation produced. Always 'allow' on outcome='allow'.
